channel.title: Panglao Prime Villas - Investment Property Feed
channel.description: Luxury villa investments in Bohol, Philippines - 17-25% annual ROI, managed Airbnb income

item.title: Panglao Prime Villa C - Luxury 4-BR Investment Property
item.description: PHP 30,000,000 luxury villa in Panglao, Bohol. Fully managed Airbnb property generating PHP 395,000+ monthly income. 17-25% annual ROI guaranteed. Legal ownership via Deed of Assignment, Leasehold, or Corporation structures.

item.title: Panglao Villa Investment - Financing + Legal Support Package
item.description: Complete investment package including property, full Airbnb management (65% occupancy guarantee), financing assistance (BDO, Israeli mortgages), and legal support. Turn-key passive income solution: PHP 395,000/month guaranteed.
item.g:service_includes: Real Estate Purchase, Property Management, Financing Coordination, Legal Documentation
item.g:target_market: Israeli Investors (Hebrew support), Philippine Residents (BDO financing), International Investors
